headline: Do Fortive’s (FTV) Aging Profit Engines Justify Its Premium Valuation And Capital Deployment Choices?
summary: In recent months, Fortive has been highlighted as facing persistent end-market challenges, with sales declining over the past five years, flat earnings per share, and low returns on capital raising questions about how effectively it is deploying funds. At the same time, concerns that Fortive’s shares trade above estimates of intrinsic value, alongside insider share sales and an elevated P/E ratio versus its own history, are prompting investors to reassess how much they are willing to pay...

headline: Fortive Isn't Ready For An Upgrade Yet
summary: Fortive Corporation remains a Hold as absolute valuation is not compelling, despite relative cheapness versus peers. Read more on FTV stock here.

headline: Fortive: Starting To Improve Its Performance
summary: Fortive has executed well post-Ralliant spin-off, delivering solid earnings and modest organic growth, supporting a fair valuation. Learn more about FTV stock here.
